hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: Andenes del Inca Hotel in Ollantaytambo offers family rooms with private bathrooms, free toiletries, and mountain views. Each room includes a work desk, TV, and soundproofing for a pleasant stay.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can enjoy a sauna, hot tub, and fitness centre. The hotel provides free WiFi, a restaurant, bar, and lounge. Additional amenities include a terrace, minibar, and electric kettle.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Peruvian cuisine with vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and dairy-free options. Breakfast includes juice, cheese, and fruits. Lunch and dinner are available in a welcoming ambience.
